label: Transparent anteater motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Anteater transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a giant anteater motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A giant anteater with accurate natural anatomy, elongated narrow snout, small ears, long sweeping bushy tail, low walking posture, grey cream fur, bold diagonal black shoulder stripe edged with cream, dark forelegs, curved claws visible but natural, coarse linear fur texture, crisp subject edges, distinctive silhouette, no extra animals.
Composition/framing: centered complete side-profile cutout with generous padding; full body visible from nose to claws to tail, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural color and stripe detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no forest scene, no grass, no rocks, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no stylized cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Anteater light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Anteater", derived from a giant anteater motif: grey and cream coarse fur, bold diagonal black shoulder stripe, long linear snout, sweeping tail, grass and forest-savanna context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible linear workflow system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Anteater, Anteater, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Workflow, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from anteater grey fur, black diagonal stripe, cream tail highlights, dark claws, dry grass accents, forest shade, and linear snout/tail silhouette. The board must read as anteater stripe and forest-savanna workflow, not zebra, badger, raccoon, or generic safari.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, ワークフロー, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, workflow timeline, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 6px-8px component radius, warm cream surfaces, charcoal primary actions, grass accent focus states, linear stripe dividers, subtle coarse-fur and long-stripe texture bands, restrained shadows, dense but organized workflow/dashboard UI.
Color palette: anteater charcoal #1f2020, stripe black #111111, fur grey #7f817b, silver mist #c4c4b8, tail cream #f3ead7, dry grass #b9a45f, savanna olive #6f7b48, forest shade #26352d, clay line #8c6f4d.
Constraints: no zebra identity, no tiger orange, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Anteater", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Anteater dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Anteater". It must feel like the same light-mode anteater system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from giant anteater grey fur, cream tail highlights, bold diagonal black shoulder stripe, long linear snout, claws, grass accents, and forest-savanna context.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Anteater, Anteater, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Workflow, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the anteater system language: charcoal and forest-shade backgrounds, tail-cream foreground text, silver fur secondary surfaces, grass-olive focus states, clay line borders, crisp diagonal stripe dividers, subtle coarse-fur and long-stripe texture bands. Must read as anteater, not zebra, badger, generic safari, or camouflage.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, ワークフロー, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, workflow timeline, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep forest-charcoal backgrounds, smoky dark cards, tail-cream text and hairline dividers, black stripe primary controls, grass-olive focus rings, silver-grey chart highlights, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 6px-8px component radius.
Color palette: night charcoal #141515, stripe black #080808, dark forest #17231d, fur graphite #4d504b, silver fur #9ea095, tail cream #eee1c6, dry grass #b9a45f, savanna olive #6f7b48, clay border #6f553c.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no zebra identity, no tiger orange, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Anteater".
